description: Felt moral outrage in response to perceived wrongdoing
interpretive_warning: Outrage can be morally important or distorted depending on context

description: Expected social reward from public expression
interpretive_warning: Reward is not identical to moral validity
Amplification is not the same as public importance

description: Strength of group or moral-community identity salience
interpretive_warning: Identity can shape expression and interpretation

description: Overrepresentation of extreme or highly engaging content
Context evidence deliberation or repair that dampens escalation
interpretive_warning: Correction depends on trust and timing

description: Susceptibility to sharing inaccurate moralized content
Exposure to different groups or perspectives
interpretive_warning: Contact quality matters more than mere exposure
Expression is shaped by social and platform incentives
May reflect platform distortion rather than actual group belief
Can mobilize solidarity or spread misinformation
